creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->dinoex

Fix Synopsis, reassign to maintainer 
Note: I was not able to replicate problem. 
Compiled fine, with default options, amd64, 9.0 
<http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/logs/9-scheidell_AMD64/graphviz-2.28.0.log> 
You will need to be more specific about your envirnoment. 
amd64? i386? 
what option knobs did you select? 
where did you put the pre-configure line in makefile? (attach diff -Nur of old, vs new makefile) 
But, most importantly, try upgrading autotools (automake, autoconf), make sure no old tools are left over. 
Make sure you have a clean, update ports tree (portsclean -C && portsnap fetch update) 
Try to help us decide what is different in your environment that makes this fail for you.
